speaker: John
content: Well, this is my room. Sorry about the mess.

speaker: John
content: You just missed my mom. On Friday, she coaches my little sister's soccer team.
mark: coach v. 训练，指导 n. 教练；私人教师；长途客车

speaker: Gabrielle
content: Yes, I heard that. John, we need to talk about what happened the other day.

speaker: John
content: Mr. Solis isn't starting to catch on, is he?
mark: He isn't starting to catch on, is he? 他还没明白过来，是吧？
否定：I’m not catching on.（我没明白）
肯定：I’m starting to catch on.（我开始懂了）

speaker: Gabrielle
content: No, he doesn't have a clue, god love him. It's just I was thinking that when you come over to garden, you might actually have to garden.
mark: clue n. 线索，提示；理解
He doesn't have a clue 他一无所知；他毫无头绪 I have no clue. 我一点头绪都没有
actually adv. 实际上，事实上
you might actually have to do sth 你可能实际上不得不做某事

speaker: John
content: Great, you're breaking up with me, in my own bedroom.

speaker: Gabrielle
content: No, I'm not dumping you. Lately, you've been the only thing keeping me going. It's just we can't do it at my house anymore.
mark: dump  v. 丢弃，扔掉；乱堆，乱放；丢下，抛弃；分手，甩掉；倾销

speaker: John
content: Oh, so then, where do you want to do it?

speaker: Gabrielle
content: Well, what time does your mom get back from soccer practice? You better hurry, we don't have a lot of time.
mark: practice n. 实践，实际操作；通常的做法，惯例；练习； v. 练习，实践；
